recommendations: shell_tool_preference_violations has produced zero measurable improvement across four consecutive calibration cycles at 55-65% rate — deprioritize generating new recommendations for this bias; existing rules are not being internalized and additional recommendations are unlikely to change the trajectory without a structural hook intervention
